headline: 3 Wireless Stocks Set to Ride on Sector Strength Despite Tough Times
summary: With solid demand for advanced networking architecture for increased broadband usage, the Zacks Wireless Equipment industry is likely to witness healthy growth. MSI, UI and NOK are set to thrive on industry tailwinds.
